(2 comments)

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

LU-5732 went upstream, so this patch wont pass the testsuite anymore. I've attached a patch to the ticket to the tests to take into account these fixes.

Patch Set 4:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 4:

Thanks to warn me about this. I don't know why but I was wrongly assuming that you had already anticipated the final/expected behavior and error returns from this patch in your new tests in your patch for LU-5732... BTW, since I was planning to either run your new tests against this patch, or apply/relate mine on top of your or now that yours has been integrated to rebase mine, hopefully auto-tests would have also warned me!

Patch Set 4:

There's also a big comment starting "Bugs following." that needs to be removed, since with your patch the bugs are fixed.

Patch Set 4:

(2 comments)

I will rebase this patch on top of master that now integrates your patch/new tests for LU-5732 and change its error detection accordingly to my changes in this patch.

parents.subject: LU-6245 libcfs: move lucache from libcfs to lustre

commit.subject: LU-5757 hsm: strengthen checks for flags and archive id
commit.message:
LU-5757 hsm: strengthen checks for flags and archive id

Prior to this patch undefined flags bits and out of range
archive id can be set.
Also changed the concerned error handling that has been
recently added (LU-5732) as part of sanity-hsm/test_500.

Signed-off-by: Bruno Faccini <bruno.faccini@intel.com>
Change-Id: I64403de4529f0214bab55c2fc13281b0a3d30a11
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/13337
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: frank zago <fzago@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Henri Doreau <henri.doreau@cea.fr>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
